However, given that only one test (`testPropertyGetMonthOfYear`) was fixed and others remained failing, it's possible that the changes didn't fix all issues but introduced new ones elsewhere. But since this particular change didn't affect most of the failing tests, maybe it's not directly causing their failures but just fixing another issue.

So, considering all this, I think the mutant in line 236 is adjacent to a fault because changing that line affects lines below it which are part of the same block. Therefore, `is_fault_adjacent` should be True.
